name: Almond Fudge Ring Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 Semisweet Chocolate Squares, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Generously grease a 9-cup bundt cake pan with almonds; coat the entire surface.
3. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except glaze on low speed, scraping the bowl constantly for 30 seconds.
4. Beat on medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally, for an additional 4 minutes.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean, about 35 to 40 minutes. Allow cooling for 5 minutes.
7. Invert the cake onto a wire rack or heatproof serving plate; carefully remove the pan.
8. Cool the cake completely before glazing.
9. Spread chocolate glaze over the top of the cake, allowing some to drizzle down the sides.
